MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-21-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER YESENIA AGUIRRE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Petitioner Yesenia Aguirre present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
This petition seeks to conform Petitioner's Name to his or her gender identity.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Jessie Yesenia Aguirre.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Denied
